translations.### [iOS] Timer 與 DispatchSourceTimer 如何: ### [iOS] How to Choose and Safely Use Timer and DispatchSourceTimer?

translations.**以下情況均會直接閃退：**\n\n: **The app will crash immediately in the following cases:**
translations.**對此，我們可以把 Timer 改加入到 .common Mode 就能解決以: **For this, we can add the Timer to the .common Mode to solve the above issue:**
translations.*Finite-State Machine 有限狀態機: 關注的是狀態之間的轉換: *Finite-State Machine: Focuses on controlling transitions between states and what actions to take.*
translations.*RunLoop 是 Thread 內的事件處理迴圈，會輪詢接收處理事件； **: *RunLoop is an event processing loop within a Thread that polls and handles events; **the system automatically creates a RunLoop for the Main Thread (RunLoop.main)**, but other Threads may not have a RunLoop.*
translations.*State Pattern: 關注的是每個狀態內的行為邏輯。*\n\n: *State Pattern: Focuses on the behavior logic within each state.*
translations.*⭐️️️⭐️️️⭐️️️因此在默認情況下，我們的 Timer 是加到 `.de: *⭐️️️⭐️️️⭐️️️Therefore, by default, our Timer is added to the `.default` Mode, **which will automatically pause when the user scrolls a ScrollView or performs gesture actions**, and will only resume after the operation ends. This may cause the Timer to trigger late or fire fewer times than expected.*
translations.*之前寫過另一篇文章「 [Design Patterns 實戰應用｜封裝 Soc: *Previously, I wrote another article "[Design Patterns Practical Application｜Encapsulating Socket.IO Real-Time Communication Architecture](https://zhgchg.li/posts/pinkoi-engineering/design-patterns-%E5%AF%A6%E6%88%B0%E6%87%89%E7%94%A8-%E5%B0%81%E8%A3%9D-socket-io-%E5%8D%B3%E6%99%82%E9%80%9A%E8%A8%8A%E6%9E%B6%E6%A7%8B%E8%88%87%E4%B8%83%E5%A4%A7%E8%A8%AD%E8%A8%88%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F%E8%A7%A3%E6%9E%90-78507a8de6a5/#%E9%9C%80%E6%B1%82%E5%A0%B4%E6%99%AF-3){:target="_blank"}," which also uses a finite-state machine and additionally applies the State Pattern.*
translations.*的確快半年沒寫什麼了，新工作剛到職，持續找尋靈感中！💪*\n\n: *Indeed, I haven't written much for almost half a year. Just started a new job and am still searching for inspiration! 💪*
translations.- Accuracy is affected by the RunLoop st:
- Accuracy is affected by the RunLoop state and may be delayed during high UI interaction or mode switching.

- Does not support advanced operations like `suspend`, `resume`, `activate`, etc.
translations.- Better operational flexibility (suppor:
- Better operational flexibility (supports `suspend` and `resume`)

- Higher accuracy and reliability: relies on GCD Queue

- Leeway can be set to control power consumption

- Stable resident task (GCD Queue)
translations.- Default integration with UI work, no n:
- Default integration with UI tasks, no need to explicitly switch to Main Thread execution

- Automatically adjusts trigger timing to optimize power usage

- Lower complexity in usage; may cause retain cycles or forgetting to stop the Timer, but will not directly cause a crash
translations.- UI operations require manually switchi:
- UI operations require manually switching back to the Main Thread

- The API is complex and order-dependent; **using it incorrectly will cause a crash**

- Encapsulation is needed for safe usage
translations.- [**Practical Application of Design Pat:
- [**Practical Application of Design Patterns (Encapsulating Socket.io)**](../78507a8de6a5/)

- [Practical Application of Design Patterns (Encapsulating WKWebView)](../f4b02ee342a4/)

- [Visitor Pattern in TableView](../60473cb47550/)
translations.- `.default`: The default added Mode, ma:
- `.default`: The default added Mode, mainly handles UI display.  
  **Will pause first when switching to `.tracking` Mode**

- `.tracking`: Handles ScrollView scrolling and Gesture recognition.

- `.common`: Handles both `.default` and `.tracking`.
translations.- `invalidate()` stops the Timer\n\n- `f:
- `invalidate()` stops the Timer

- `fire()` triggers immediately once
translations.- ❌ Calling suspend() and resume() not i:
- ❌ Calling suspend() and resume() not in pairs  
  Calling suspend() twice in a row  
  Calling resume() twice in a row

- ❌ Calling cancel() after suspend()  
  You need to call resume() before cancel()

- ❌ Timer Released (nil) While in suspend() State

- ❌ Calling other operations after cancel()
translations.- ⭐️️️View Controller strongly holds Tim:
- ⭐️️️ View Controller strongly holds Timer, **the Timer's execution block (handler/closure) must use weak self; otherwise, it will cause a retain cycle.**

- ⭐️️️ Be sure to call Timer invalidate() when the View Controller lifecycle ends, otherwise the RunLoop will still hold the Timer and keep running it.
translations.> *Finite-State Machine: Focuses on cont: > *Finite-State Machine: Focuses on controlling transitions between states and the actions to perform.*
translations.> *Indeed, I haven't written much for al: > *Indeed, I haven't written much for almost half a year. Just started a new job and am still searching for inspiration! 💪*

translations.> *⭐️️️⭐️️️⭐️️️Therefore, by default, ou: > *⭐️️️⭐️️️⭐️️️Therefore, by default, our Timer is added to the `.default` mode, **which will automatically pause when the user scrolls a ScrollView or performs gesture actions**, and will only resume after the operation ends. This may cause the Timer to trigger late or fire fewer times than expected.*
translations.> The next article might share the proce: > The next article might share the process of managing certificates with Fastlane Match and setting up a Self-hosted Runner… or Bitbucket Pipeline… or the AppStoreConnect API…
translations.API 使用複雜且有順序， **用錯會 Crash**\n: The API is complex and order-dependent; **using it incorrectly will cause a crash**
translations.DispatchSourceTimer 是 GCD 的 Objective-C: DispatchSourceTimer is a GCD Objective-C object, making it difficult to mock during testing (no Protocol available); therefore, we need to define a Protocol + Factory Pattern layer ourselves so that TimerStateMachine can be testable.
translations.DispatchSourceTimer 的生命週期取決於是否仍被外部物件持有；G: The lifecycle of a DispatchSourceTimer depends on whether it is still retained by an external object; the GCD queue itself does not strongly retain the timer's owner and only handles scheduling and executing events.
translations.DispatchSourceTimer 雖然提供更多可操作方法： `activa: Although DispatchSourceTimer offers more control methods: `activate`, `suspend`, `resume`, `cancel`; it is extremely sensitive. Calling them in the wrong order can cause immediate crashes (EXC_BREAKPOINT/DispatchSourceTimer), which is very dangerous.
translations.Timer 應該是大家最直覺會先想到的 API，但是在選擇及使用 Timer 上: Timer is probably the most intuitive API that comes to mind first, but there are several points to consider when choosing and using Timer.
translations.UI 層面需求，例如輪播 Banners (Auto Scroll Scroll: For UI-level needs, such as carousel banners (auto-scrolling ScrollView) or countdown timers for coupon claims, where the user only needs to interact with the current foreground screen, I choose to use Timer directly. It is convenient, fast, and safe to achieve the goal.
translations.UI 操作需自行切換回 Main Thread\n: UI operations require manually switching back to the Main Thread
translations.`.default` ：預設加入的 Mode，主要是處理 UI 顯示。\n**會:
`.default`: The default added Mode, mainly handles UI display.  
**Will pause first when switching to `.tracking` Mode**
translations.`.tracking` ：處理 ScrollView 滾動、Gesture 手勢: `.tracking`: Handles ScrollView scrolling and Gesture recognition.
translations.❌ suspend() 後呼叫 cancel()\n需要先 resume() 才:
❌ Calling cancel() after suspend()  
You need to call resume() before cancel()
translations.❌ suspend() 狀態下 Timer 被釋放 (nil)\n: ❌ Timer Released (nil) While in suspend() State
translations.❌ suspend() 與 resume() 沒有成對使用\nsuspend():
❌ Calling suspend() and resume() not in pairs  
Calling suspend() twice in a row  
Calling resume() twice in a row
translations.⭐️️️View Controller 強持有 Timer， **Timer 的: ⭐️️️View Controller strongly holds Timer, **the Timer's Execution Block (handler/closure) must use Weak Self; otherwise, it will cause a Retain Cycle.**
translations.⭐️️️務必在 View Controller 生命週期結束時呼叫 Timer: ⭐️️️ Be sure to call Timer invalidate() when the View Controller lifecycle ends, otherwise the RunLoop will still hold the Timer and continue running it.
translations.下一篇可能分享 Fastlane Match 憑證管理跟 Self-hosted: The next article might share the process of managing certificates with Fastlane Match and setting up a Self-hosted Runner… or Bitbucket Pipeline… or the AppStoreConnect API…
translations.不支援 `suspend` , `resume` , `activate` …等: Does not support advanced operations like `suspend`, `resume`, `activate`, etc.
translations.也可以自行宣告 Timer 物件加入到 RunLoop:\n\n: You can also declare a Timer object yourself and add it to the RunLoop:
translations.使用有限狀態機與 Design Patterns 封裝 DispatchSour: Encapsulating DispatchSourceTimer with Finite-State Machine and Design Patterns for Safer and Easier Use.
translations.使用複雜度較低，最多只會發生 Retain Cycle 或忘記停止 Timer，: Lower complexity usage, at most causing Retain Cycle or forgetting to stop the Timer, but will not directly cause a Crash
translations.假設我們的 DispatchSourceHandler 希望執行的事能動態改變，: Assuming we want the DispatchSourceHandler to execute tasks that can change dynamically, we can use the Strategy Pattern to encapsulate the work content.
translations.到此如何安全的使用 DispatchSourceTimer 環節已結束，再來延伸: The section on how to safely use DispatchSourceTimer has concluded. Next, we will extend to several Design Patterns to help us abstract objects for testing and abstract the execution logic of DispatchSourceHandler.
translations.可自行設定 leeway 控制耗電量\n: Leeway can be set to control power consumption
translations.在 UI Main Thread 上建立 Timer，Timer 會被 Main: Creating a Timer on the UI Main Thread means the Timer is strongly held by the Main Thread's RunLoop and is periodically triggered by the RunLoop's polling mechanism. It will only be released after calling Timer's invalidate(). Therefore, we need to strongly hold the Timer in the ViewController and call Timer invalidate() in deinit to properly stop and release the Timer when the view is dismissed.
translations.在 iOS 開發中一定會遇到的需求場景「Timer 定時觸發器」；從 UI 層面: In iOS development, the "Timer trigger" scenario is inevitable; from UI-level countdown displays and banner carousels to data logic-level timed event sending and periodic data cleanup, we all need Timers to help achieve these goals.
translations.如上圖所示，我們使用有限狀態機封裝 DispatchSourceTimer 的操: As shown in the above figure, we use a finite-state machine to encapsulate DispatchSourceTimer operations, making it safer and easier to use:
translations.我們可以直接使用 `Timer.scheduledTimer` 宣告一個 Tim: We can directly use `Timer.scheduledTimer` to declare a Timer (it will automatically add to RunLoop.main & **Mode: .default**):
translations.我們簡單使用有限狀態機「封裝了狀態可以轉換成什麼狀態」與「狀態需要做什麼」的邏輯: We simply used a finite-state machine to encapsulate the logic of "which states can transition to which" and "what each state needs to do." Calls made in the wrong state are ignored (no crashes). We also added some optimizations, such as allowing cancel in the suspended state and re-activating from the cancelled state.
translations.有了狀態機確保 DispatchSourceTimer 能安全使用之後還沒結束，: Ensuring safe use of DispatchSourceTimer with a state machine is not the end. We cannot guarantee that calls to DispatchSourceTimerMachine from outside occur on the same thread. If different threads operate on this object, it can cause race conditions and lead to crashes.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.現在，我們可以安全無憂的使用 `DispatchSourceTimerMachi: Now, we can safely use the `DispatchSourceTimerMachine` object as a Timer without any worries:
translations.相較 Timer 適合 UI 層面的場景，DispatchSourceTimer: Compared to Timer, which is suitable for UI-related scenarios, DispatchSourceTimer is better for tasks unrelated to the UI or the user's current screen. The most common use cases include sending tracking events regularly, where user actions are sent to the server periodically, or cleaning up unused CoreData data at set intervals. These tasks are well suited for DispatchSourceTimer.
translations.精確度受 RunLoop 狀態影響，在 UI 高互動或 Mode 切換時可能延後: Accuracy is affected by the RunLoop state and may be delayed during high UI interaction or mode switching.
translations.精確度與可靠程度較高：依賴 GCD Queue\n: Higher accuracy and reliability: relies on GCD Queue
translations.自動調整觸發時機優化使用電量\n: Automatically Adjust Trigger Timing to Optimize Power Usage
translations.這樣我們就能對 `TimerAdapter` / `DispatchSource: This allows us to write Mock Objects for `TimerAdapter` / `DispatchSourceTimerAdapterFactorySpec` during testing to run unit tests.
translations.進入本篇文章的另一個重點，該如何安全的使用 DispatchSourceTime: Moving on to another key point of this article: How to safely use DispatchSourceTimer?
translations.除了 Timer 之外，GCD 也提供了另一個 DispatchSourceTi: Besides Timer, GCD also offers another option called DispatchSourceTimer.
translations.需要封裝才能安全使用\n: Encapsulation Is Needed for Safe Usage
translations.默認與 UI 工作整合，不需要特別切 Main Thread 執行\n: Default integration with UI work, no need to explicitly switch to Main Thread execution
